allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; const dndkit = Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => k.includes\('dnd-kit'\)\); const atlaskit = Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => k.includes\('pragmatic'\)\); console.log\('dnd-kit:', dndkit\); console.log\('atlaskit:', atlaskit\);")
